things.name: Hassan II Mosque
things.description: World's third largest mosque with a 210m minaret - built on a promontory over the Atlantic

things.name: Rick's Cafe
things.description: Faithful recreation of the famous Humphrey Bogart Casablanca film cafe - doesn't really exist but now does

things.name: Old Medina
things.description: Casablanca's compact old walled medina with traditional stalls, cafes and the old port

things.name: Boulevard Mohammed V Art Deco
things.description: France's finest Art Deco architecture outside Paris along Casablanca's main boulevard

things.name: Corniche Beach (Ain Diab)
things.description: Atlantic beach strip with beach clubs, seafood restaurants and the Sheraton tower

things.name: Morocco Mall
things.description: Largest shopping mall in Africa with an enormous aquarium as its centrepiece

things.name: Central Market (Marche Central)
things.description: Belle Epoque covered market with Morocco's finest seafood and fresh produce

things.name: Villa des Arts
things.description: Art deco mansion showcasing Moroccan and international contemporary art

things.name: Mahkama du Pacha
things.description: 1952 Moorish palace decorated with the finest Moroccan stucco and woodwork

things.name: Marrakech Day Trip
things.description: 3-hour train to the imperial city of souqs, riads and the Djemaa el-Fna square
